case_id: GP Board Report (synthetic, created during task)

pi_items.source: Matches task.json description section (line 3): 'Create a new report named GP Board Report'. Verified against iDempiere PA_Report table naming conventions.
Matches task.json description section (line 1): 'Create a new set named Gross Profit Analysis'. Verified against iDempiere PA_ReportLineSet table naming conventions.
Matches task.json description section (line 2): 'Create a new set named Current Period Analysis'. Verified against iDempiere PA_ReportColumnSet table naming conventions.

Matches task.json description: 'Line 1: Name 'Total Revenue', Type 'Segment Value''. Verified to map to PA_ReportLine.linetype='S' (Segment Value) per iDempiere API documentation (X_PA_ReportLine constants).
Matches task.json description: 'Line 2: Name 'Total COGS', Type 'Segment Value''. Verified to map to PA_ReportLine.linetype='S' (Segment Value) per iDempiere API documentation.

Matches task.json description: 'Line 3: Name 'Gross Profit', Type 'Calculation''. Verified to map to PA_ReportLine.linetype='C' (Calculation) per iDempiere API documentation. Calculation configured as: Operand 1 (Total Revenue) - Operand 2 (Total COGS).

Matches task.json description: 'Column 1: Name 'Period Actual', Amount Type 'Period Balance''. Verified to map to PA_ReportColumn with amounttype='BP' (B=Balance, P=Period) per iDempiere Financial Report documentation.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating three linked configuration records in iDempiere's Performance Analysis module: (1) A Report Line Set named 'Gross Profit Analysis' with three lines - 'Total Revenue' (Segment Value type S), 'Total COGS' (Segment Value type S), and 'Gross Profit' (Calculation type C that subtracts COGS from Revenue); (2) A Report Column Set named 'Current Period Analysis' with one column 'Period Actual' (Amount Type BP for Balance-Period); (3) A Financial Report named 'GP Board Report' linking both sets. All metadata values are consistent with iDempiere PA_Report, PA_ReportLineSet, PA_ReportLine, PA_ReportColumnSet, and PA_ReportColumn table definitions. This is synthetic data created during task execution in the GardenWorld client.
